plugins.description: Ship full-stack projects autonomously with 11 coordinated AI agents. 9-phase pipeline with anti-AI-slop UI design gate, 3-way code review (static + runtime + tooling), SaaS-class readiness checks, and pre-seeded .claude/ self-docs in generated apps.
